description_long: This picnic table features a rectangular wooden tabletop with a rich, dark brown finish and visible wood grain, giving it a rustic yet refined appearance. The table is supported by a sturdy black metal frame with tubular legs and crossbars, providing both stability and industrial style. Two matching wooden benches, each with a backrest and metal supports, are positioned on opposite sides of the table, allowing for comfortable seating. The benches are attached to the frame, ensuring they remain aligned and secure. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor or semi-outdoor environments. There is no visible umbrella hole in the center of the tabletop.
description: A dark wood and black metal picnic table with attached benches and backrests, featuring a robust industrial design. The table and benches are integrated into a single, sturdy unit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop, both benches with backrests, and the supporting metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the tabletop and benches, with the metal legs and frame visible beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrests of the benches and the symmetrical structure of the table and frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the bench profile, tabletop planks, and metal support structure.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a black tubular steel frame with four legs and crossbars connecting the legs for added stability.
